phases.name: Implementation
phases.description: Create the single-file animated Coming Soon HTML page

tasks.title: Create index.html with full animated Coming Soon page
tasks.description: Create /Users/melih/Documents/code/test_small/index.html as a standalone file with all CSS and JS embedded. Include: dark background (#050508), glassmorphism container, glitch-animated COMING SOON heading, three animated gradient orbs, canvas particle system (~120 particles), countdown timer to 2027-01-01, badge, subtitle, decorative shimmer line, and tagline. All animations run on load with no external dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Single index.html file exists at repo root
COMING SOON heading has glitch animation with cyan and pink pseudo-elements
Three blurred gradient orbs animate with drift keyframes
Canvas particle field renders ~120 colored particles that wrap edges
Glassmorphism card uses backdrop-filter blur and semi-transparent border

tasks.title: Verify page renders correctly in browser
tasks.description: Open index.html directly in a browser (no server required) and confirm all visual elements and animations are working: dark background, orbs animating, glitch effect on heading, countdown ticking, particles moving smoothly.
acceptance_criteria: Page opens without errors in browser
All animations run smoothly on load
